creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
$ echo 'int main() {}' >a.c
$ cc a.c /usr/local/lib/libyuv.so
$ ./a.out
ld-elf.so.1: /usr/local/lib/libyuv.so: Undefined symbol "jpeg_resync_to_restart"
